code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = io.read_line().ok_or("no input")?
  let trimmed = string.trim(line)
  let n = string.parse_int(trimmed).ok_or("invalid int")?
  mut sum = 0
  mut i = 1
  while i <= n
    sum = sum + i
    i = i + 1
  end
  print("sum=#{sum}")
  Ok(())
end
